response.brand_positioning: Nike positions itself as the ultimate performance brand that empowers athletes of all levels. Their 'Just Do It' ethos transcends sport to represent determination and achievement.
response.current_creative_angle: Emotional motivation through athlete stories — from elite professionals to everyday runners. Focus on personal bests over competitive wins.
response.visual_identity_notes: Bold typography, high-contrast black/white with signature orange accent. Dynamic motion blur. Celebrity athlete close-ups.
recent_campaigns: Play New — encouraging trying new sports
